sentence_reviews.text: Reservoir computing drives a fixed recurrent dynamical system with input and trains only a lightweight readout from its rich transient state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning recurrent-network and reservoir/echo-state background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition matches standard reservoir computing, but the packet source is general and not a dedicated reservoir-computing citation.
Fixed recurrent dynamics are central to reservoir computing.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Recurrence & feedback state, Dynamical systems & control theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Reservoir computing (ESN / LSM) is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Recurrence & feedback state.
sentence_reviews.notes: Reservoir computing relies on recurrent reservoir state dynamics.

sentence_reviews.text: Reservoir computing (ESN / LSM) rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Dynamical systems & control theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Recurrent dynamical-system reservoir framing and AIMA control/dynamics background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Reservoir state evolution is a dynamical system; control-theory dependency is a defensible synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: Reservoir computing (ESN / LSM) follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning readout training; AIMA supervised learning background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The trained readout is commonly supervised, though reservoir construction itself is fixed/untrained.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Reservoir computing (ESN / LSM) is modeled as depending on Recurrence & feedback state, Dynamical systems & control theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning claim, not an external-world necessity claim.

edge_reviews.notes: composes/core is directly supported by reservoir recurrent state dynamics.
requires/core is defensible because reservoir behavior is framed as a dynamical system, though 'control theory' is broader than necessary.
trained_under/common is appropriate for supervised readout training.
